channel.title: Posts on My blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on My blog

item.title: Daily Status
item.description: This is my daily status. I learned this from my company and I think it is a good idea to keep track of what we did every day for reflection and making progress. It also helps us keep track of our time and makes sure we only focus on important things each day.

item.title: Markdown Syntax Guide
item.description: Sample article showcasing basic Markdown syntax and formatting for HTML elements.
